assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A section creates two tasks for stream rhtpa-2.2: upstream backport (line 17) and downstream propagation (line 88), both with labels ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Both tasks use jira.create_link with type: "Depend" and inwardIssue: "TC-8020" (lines 22-28 and 94-100).

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 26-31 show JQL search for sibling CVE in rhtpa-2.1 returned no results, explicitly triggering Case B. remediation.md lines 152-309 create preemptive remediation tasks for rhtpa-2.1. cross-stream.md confirms: 'No sibling CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1. Preemptive remediation tasks have been created.'

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 (line 167): labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Preemptive Task 2 (line 240): labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Both match the expected label set exactly.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 (lines 171-177): jira.create_link with type: "Related" and comment 'Related -- not Depend'. Preemptive Task 2 (lines 248-254): same pattern. cross-stream.md lines 40-42 explicitly state: 'Link type: Related (not Depend)' and explain 'because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream (rhtpa-2.2)'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 description (lines 192-195) includes: '**Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' Preemptive Task 2 description (lines 277-280) includes the identical prefix. Both explicitly reference TC-8020 and stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating CVE.
